subject: Chatot, a parrot-like black-headed Pokemon with a musical-note tail, perched on a branch in a leafy setting
description: A small parrot-like bird perches on a branch surrounded by bright green leaves and foliage. The head is black and rounded, contrasting with a colorful body of blue, green, and yellow. The tail is distinctively shaped like a musical note, a defining visual feature clearly visible here. The beak is yellow and somewhat large relative to the body. The overall composition is lively and cheerful, with the bird posed alert among lush tropical-feeling greenery.
foreground: colorful parrot-like bird with musical-note tail on a branch
